'''zhatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:numerologically|numerologically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:numerologically|numerologically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhatate|zhatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhatatesher|zhatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatatesherĂ«m|zhatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhatatero|zhatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhatateshĂ«|zhatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatateshĂ«m|zhatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhatatero|gokizhatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhatateshĂ«|gokizhatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhatateshĂ«m|gokizhatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhatankerom|gozhatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhatankeshĂ«|gozhatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhatankeshĂ«m|gozhatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhatankeya|gozhatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhataterom|zhataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatatemu|zhatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhatateya|zhatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhataterom|gokizhataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhatatemu|gokizhatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhatateya|gokizhatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhatatate|zhatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhatatatesher|zhatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatatatesherĂ«m|zhatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhatatatero|zhatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhatatateshĂ«|zhatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatatateshĂ«m|zhatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhatatatero|gokizhatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhatatateshĂ«|gokizhatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhatatateshĂ«m|gokizhatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhatatankerom|gozhatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhatatankeshĂ«|gozhatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhatatankeshĂ«m|gozhatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhatatankeya|gozhatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhatataterom|zhatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhatatatemu|zhatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhatatateya|zhatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhatataterom|gokizhatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhatatatemu|gokizhatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhatatateya|gokizhatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠte|zhĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠtesher|zhĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠtero|zhĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠterom|zhĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠtemu|zhĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠtĂŠteya|zhĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠtĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhaftafte|zhaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhaftaftesher|zhaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaftaftesherĂ«m|zhaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhaftaftero|zhaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhaftafteshĂ«|zhaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaftafteshĂ«m|zhaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhaftaftero|gokizhaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhaftafteshĂ«|gokizhaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhaftafteshĂ«m|gokizhaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhaftafnkerom|gozhaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhaftafnkeshĂ«|gozhaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhaftafnkeshĂ«m|gozhaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhaftafnkeya|gozhaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhaftafterom|zhaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaftaftemu|zhaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhaftafteya|zhaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhaftafterom|gokizhaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhaftaftemu|gokizhaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhaftafteya|gokizhaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
